overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game (GTA IV) showing a character walking along a waterfront promenade in an urban setting. The character walks steadily past benches and trees with the Statue of Happiness visible across the harbor and modern high-rise buildings lining the right side, approaching a large ferry terminal building.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade with harbor view and benches

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the paved waterfront promenade toward the distant ferry terminal

notable_agents.action: sitting on a bench facing the water

entered.detail: large green statue on an island across the harbor, resembling the Statue of Liberty
large white multi-story building with rows of windows at the water's edge
black metal railing separating the walkway from the water
concrete benches lined along the waterfront facing the harbor
mature deciduous trees with green foliage casting shadows on the path
tall modern glass and concrete skyscrapers in the background
ornate black metal lamp posts with spherical lights

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunny waterfront promenade with the Statue of Happiness visible across the harbor. The character walks along a paved path lined with benches, trees, and ornate street lamps. A few pedestrians sit on benches enjoying the view, while modern high-rise buildings rise in the background on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching ferry terminal with pedestrian activity

events.description: character passes a pedestrian walking in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: continuing along the promenade, approaching the ferry terminal building while navigating around other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in green shirt and shorts walking toward the camera

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking as the ferry terminal building grows larger ahead. A pedestrian in a green shirt walks past in the opposite direction. The high-rise buildings fade from view behind the trees on the right, while the waterfront railing and benches remain prominent along the left side.

agents.ego_description: walking alongside the ferry terminal building, passing seated pedestrians on benches

notable_agents.action: pedestrian sitting on bench facing the water near the ferry terminal

segments.scene_description: The character walks alongside the large ferry terminal building which now dominates the left side of the frame. The Statue of Happiness remains visible across the water. Several pedestrians sit on benches facing the harbor, and the tree line has passed behind the camera. The promenade continues with consistent paving and railings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a sunny waterfront promenade that gradually shifts from an open view of the city skyline to the imposing presence of a ferry terminal. It begins with the character walking past ornate street lamps and benches, with the Statue of Happiness visible across the harbor and modern high-rise buildings framing the right side. As the character advances, the high-rises fade behind a line of trees while a pedestrian in a green shirt passes by in the opposite direction. The scene then shifts as the large ferry terminal building grows in scale to dominate the left side of the frame, replacing the distant urban backdrop. Finally, the camera continues along the paved path past harbor-facing benches, keeping the distant statue in view as the tree line recedes behind the perspective.
